{% with base_url=request.scheme|add:"://"|add:request.get_host %}
{% if settings.GOBII_PROPRIETARY_MODE %}
# Gobii

> Gobii completes sourcing work across existing recruiting tools.

## Overview

Gobii helps recruiting teams turn role briefs into completed sourcing work. Users enter the role, and Gobii researches candidates, builds shortlists, writes hiring-manager briefs, and hands off results across existing recruiting tools. Managed LinkedIn Recruiter automation is available through sales.

## Important URLs

- Gobii home: {{ base_url }}/
- Solutions: {{ base_url }}/solutions/
- Developers: {{ base_url }}/solutions/engineering/
- Documentation: https://docs.gobii.ai/
- Pricing: {{ base_url }}/pricing/
- Terms of service: {{ base_url }}/tos/
- Privacy policy: {{ base_url }}/privacy/
- Data deletion: {{ base_url }}/data-deletion/

## Documentation

The public documentation at https://docs.gobii.ai/ is the primary source for setup guides, API behavior, integration details, and developer-facing reference material. Prefer documentation pages for implementation-specific details.

## Agent Platform

Gobii agents are designed for delegated recruiting operations work that may involve browsing, tool use, structured outputs, files, spreadsheets, and scheduled or asynchronous tasks. User-specific data, credentials, and private task details should be treated as sensitive and should not be inferred from public pages.

## Recruiting Operations

Gobii is focused on recruiting operations: enter a role brief, then have AI agents research candidates, prepare a shortlist, generate hiring-manager briefs, and hand off results.

## Policies

Use the terms of service, privacy policy, and data deletion pages for current policy language. Those pages are authoritative over this summary.

## Integrations

- Google Sheets
- Gmail
- Outlook / Microsoft 365
- Apollo
- Discord
- Hubspot
- Browser-based recruiting systems
- Web browsing
- File uploads
- Remote MCP tools
- Many more - see [Integrations]({{ base_url }}/app/integrations) in your account for details.


- Gobii recruiting agents are persistent digital workers that can search web sources, operate business software, and deliver organized candidate research.
- Gobii recruiting operations workflows can turn a role brief into a source-linked shortlist with fit notes, profile links, work-history context, and hiring-manager briefs.
- Managed LinkedIn Recruiter automation is available through sales.
- Recruiting workflows can export to Google Sheets, CSV, webhooks, and enterprise ATS integrations where configured.
- Gobii is best described as a recruiting operations platform for delegated sourcing, research, shortlist preparation, and workflow handoff, not as a replacement for recruiter judgment or hiring compliance review.

## Open Source Software

Gobii is open-source software; the source code is available at https://github.com/gobii-ai/gobii-platform.

{% else %}
# Gobii

> Gobii provides AI agents for recruiting operations.

## Overview

Gobii helps recruiting teams automate repetitive sourcing, candidate research, shortlist preparation, and workflow handoff across the tools they already use. Users enter the role, and Gobii agents research candidates, prepare recruiter-reviewable shortlists, and generate hiring-manager briefs.

## Important URLs

- Gobii home: {{ base_url }}/
- Documentation: https://docs.gobii.ai/
- Pricing: {{ base_url }}/pricing/
- Terms of service: {{ base_url }}/tos/
- Privacy policy: {{ base_url }}/privacy/
- Data deletion: {{ base_url }}/data-deletion/

## Documentation

The public documentation at https://docs.gobii.ai/ is the primary source for setup guides, API behavior, integration details, and developer-facing reference material. Prefer documentation pages for implementation-specific details.

## Agent Platform

Gobii agents are designed for delegated recruiting operations work that may involve browsing, tool use, structured outputs, files, spreadsheets, and scheduled or asynchronous tasks. User-specific data, credentials, and private task details should be treated as sensitive and should not be inferred from public pages.

## Recruiting Operations

Gobii is focused on recruiting operations: enter a job description, then have AI agents research candidates, prepare a shortlist, and generate hiring-manager briefs. Public template and solution pages are no longer the primary product surface.

## Policies

Use the terms of service, privacy policy, and data deletion pages for current policy language. Those pages are authoritative over this summary.

## Integrations

- Google Sheets
- Gmail
- Outlook / Microsoft 365
- Apollo
- Discord
- Hubspot
- Browser-based recruiting systems
- Web browsing
- File uploads
- Remote MCP tools
- Many more - see [Integrations]({{ base_url }}/app/integrations) in your account for details.


- Gobii recruiting agents are persistent digital workers that can search web sources, operate business software, and deliver organized candidate research.
- Gobii recruiting operations workflows can turn a role brief into a source-linked shortlist with fit notes, profile links, work-history context, and hiring-manager briefs.
- Recruiting workflows can export to Google Sheets, CSV, webhooks, and enterprise ATS integrations where configured.
- Gobii is best described as a recruiting operations platform for delegated sourcing, research, shortlist preparation, and workflow handoff, not as a replacement for recruiter judgment or hiring compliance review.

## Open Source Software

Gobii is open-source software; the source code is available at https://github.com/gobii-ai/gobii-platform.

{% endif %}
{% endwith %}
